personalInfo.name: Amit Raj Anand
personalInfo.title: Senior Software Engineer
personalInfo.bio: I'm a Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building full-stack, cloud-based web applications - from requirement gathering to deployment support - using PHP, JavaScript, and modern frameworks. Let's collaborate and bring your ideas to life.

projects.title: IDFC SO App - Liabilities Product
projects.description: Led end-to-end delivery (requirement gathering to deployment support) for the Liabilities Product vertical in the IDFC SO App across urban and rural regions.

projects.title: Insurance Aggregator Platform
projects.description: Spearheaded development of a web and mobile application automating the aggregation of multiple insurance providers for automobiles, focused mainly on the Qatar market.

projects.title: ApnaComplex Module Enhancements
projects.description: Optimized existing modules and enhanced the product with new modules designed and developed from scratch for a residential society management platform.

keyResponsibilities: Contributing to full-stack web application development and delivery as part of the engineering team.
Led end-to-end delivery (requirement gathering to deployment support) for the Liabilities Product vertical in the IDFC SO App across urban and rural regions.
Spearheaded development of a web and mobile application automating the aggregation of multiple insurance providers for automobiles, focused mainly on the Qatar market.
Optimized existing modules and enhanced the product with new modules designed and developed from scratch.
Developed and maintained web applications using PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, and Bootstrap.
Developed and maintained web applications using PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, and Bootstrap.

education.institution: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology, Bhubaneswar, Odisha
